examples: Rent the Runway has certainly redefined the fashion business, bringing high-end wear to Everywoman.
Embodying versions of the everywoman, their characters Mindy Lahiri and Hannah Horvath don't ignore their curves, a simple but subversive statement in image-conscious Hollywood.
There are moments in some episodes where our Everywoman admits to having financial difficulties and even gets her credit card declined publicly on one occasion.
